creator: simon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->patched

Patch commtted to HEAD, thanks for the submission! 

I plan to MFC in about two weeks (and when I had a chance 
to do at least minimal testing on 6-STABLE). 

Note that I don't know what the "patch" from Andriy Podanenko 
does, so I haven't looked at that.  It should probably be filed 
as a seperate PR with description of what it does...
